title: One Heart
description: Datapack changes the amount of health to one heart.
body:
This datapack changes the number of hearts to one. The datapack was tested in single-player survival mode.
The datapack can be combined with other datapacks to achieve a better effect. In case of any problems, please contact us.
The datapack enhances hardcore gameplay and can be used for dropper and hardcore maps.
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vRYuFuGm/images/e6851cb1a13a3be8fe293543e2c55ef8a41b0fa2.png)
